Name: Origin M80
Description:
Manufacturer: Origin Jumpworks
Focus: Heavy Fighter

Embrace elegance without compromising defense with the M80. Featuring Origin's famous sleek and sophisticated design, the ship's hull slyly hides an aggressive weapons systems that can be unfurled and unleashed on assailants at a moment's notice.
